data.description_suggestion: Creates a direct prescription transfer from the authenticated pharmacy to a destination pharmacy. Accepts CreateDirectTransferV1Request with prescription and destination pharmacy details. Returns a DirectTransferResponse with transfer confirmation and status. This operation immediately initiates the transfer without requiring destination pharmacy approval. Use v2 endpoint for enhanced functionality.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a direct prescription transfer from the authenticated pharmacy to a destination pharmacy using the v2 schema. Accepts CreateDirectTransferV2Request with enhanced prescription and pharmacy details. Returns HTTP 202 Accepted with DirectTransferResponse, indicating asynchronous processing. This version provides improved validation and additional transfer options compared to v1. Prefer this endpoint for new integrations.

The transfer request is created in pending status and requires acceptance by the destination pharmacy before completion.
